parameters.code:
if not self.won and self.flash == 0 and not self.falling and not self.swap_off:
    gx = int((self.mouse_x - self.ox) // self.tile)
    gy = int((self.mouse_y - self.oy) // self.tile)
    if gx < 0 or gx >= self.cols or gy < 0 or gy >= self.rows:
        self.sel = None
    elif self.sel is None:
        self.sel = (gx, gy)
    elif self.sel == (gx, gy):
        self.sel = None
    elif abs(self.sel[0] - gx) + abs(self.sel[1] - gy) != 1:
        self.sel = (gx, gy)
    else:
        g = self.grid
        sx = self.sel[0]
        sy = self.sel[1]
        tmp = g[gy][gx]
        g[gy][gx] = g[sy][sx]
        g[sy][sx] = tmp
        self.last_swap = (gx, gy, sx, sy)
        self.pending_marks = self.find_matches(g, self.rows, self.cols)
        self.swap_phase = 'forward'
        self.arm_swap((gx, gy), (sx, sy))
        self.sel = None
        self._sound_queue.append('snd_swap')
